mapper.select: SELECT g.name as name, sd.num as num FROM storedetail sd INNER JOIN goods g ON sd.goodsId = g.gsid WHERE sd.num < 10 AND g.state = '1' ORDER BY sd.num ASC
SELECT g.name as name, sd.num as num FROM storedetail sd INNER JOIN goods g ON sd.goodsId = g.gsid WHERE sd.num < 20 AND g.state = '1' ORDER BY sd.num ASC
